caption: A man wearing a white long-sleeved shirt, light-colored suspenders, a red bow tie, and a tall, grey, textured wig speaks into a professional microphone. He wears black over-ear headphones and glasses. He is seated in a room with a wall behind him featuring framed pictures and clothing on hangers, including a garment with "LEE" printed on it. To his left is a microphone on a boom arm, and on-screen graphics appear twice: a circular logo that reads "THE TALK SHOW PODCAST" and text that reads "GOSS TALK JOY". Across the sequence, the man remains in the same position, slightly shifting his facial expression and mouth movements as he talks, while the background and equipment remain static.
